name: Path Routing Accuracy Judge
description: Did the IVR correctly identify and route New vs Existing vs Recent-Install, including the path-determination question and wrong-path self-selection?
judgePrompt: Judge whether the agent routed the caller to the correct warranty path. The agent should ask the path-determination question (e.g., 'have you already submitted a claim for this issue?') when intent is ambiguous, and select: PATH 1 New Claim (not submitted), PATH 2 Existing Claim (collect number + warm transfer), or PATH 3 Recent Install Issue (post-install problem). FAIL if it starts a brand-new submission for someone who already has a claim, skips the determination question on ambiguous intent, treats a recent-install issue as a plain new claim without the CEL/DTC guidance, or transfers when self-service was appropriate. Otherwise PASS.
